# ipmi_sel (Data Source)

Up to `max_entries` most-recent System Event Log records from `ipmitool sel elist last <N>`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cipher_suite` (Number)
- `host` (String)
- `interface` (String)
- `max_entries` (Number) Most-recent N entries to fetch; default 100.
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `port` (Number)
- `username` (String)

### Read-Only

- `entries` (Attributes List) Newest-first list of SEL records. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `direction` (String)
- `event_type` (String)
- `record_id` (String)
- `sensor` (String)
- `timestamp` (String)
